scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 2 non-partitioned legacy-parity read streams; company_news/company_profile/stock_recommendations are blocked (ENGINE_GAP: symbol-partitioned fan-out with no fan-out mechanism in the declarative dialect); the full Finnhub surface (real-time quotes, forex, crypto, financials) is out of scope until Pass B

excluded.reason: ENGINE_GAP: legacy fans this stream out across the configured symbols list (one request per symbol, each with a from/to date window), which the declarative dialect has no mechanism to express; see docs.md Known limits and this bundle's reported blocker

ENGINE_GAP: same symbol-partitioned fan-out limitation as company-news, plus a field-fallback (ticker defaults to the request symbol when the API omits it) with no conditional-fallback primitive in computed_fields
ENGINE_GAP: same symbol-partitioned fan-out limitation as company-news, plus a field-fallback (symbol defaults to the request symbol when the API omits it)
